name: OpenLibrary — multi-author search and add
description: Showcases: sequential composition — the same collect+add action pair is chained twice with different queries. context.collected_items is safely overwritten between batches. expected_count = limit_a (3) + limit_b (2) = 5.

steps.description: Clear shelf so both batches start from zero
Batch 1 — add Dune books to shelf
Batch 2 — collect {{limit_b}} {{query_b}} books published before {{year_b}} (overwrites collected_items safely)
Batch 2 — add Tolkien books to shelf
